hooks.prompt: A git push just completed in the paul-shannon/daylightViz repository. Use mcp__github__list_pull_requests to check if an open PR already exists for the current branch targeting main. If no open PR exists, use mcp__github__create_pull_request to create one targeting main. Use the most recent commit message as the PR title (strip the attribution URL line). Keep the PR body brief: one sentence describing the change, plus the attribution line.
